'''âp-g-r-d''' ('''kapagredoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedset|wedset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedset|wedset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-r-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapagredoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagredoko|thipagredoko]] || [[word:jipagredoko|jipagredoko]] || [[word:shipagredoko|shipagredoko]] || [[word:kipagredoko|kipagredoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpagredoko|thĂŠpagredoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpagredoko|jĂŠpagredoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpagredoko|shĂŠpagredoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpagredoko|kĂŠpagredoko]]

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
